exceptions.reason: Self-contained first-time setup package outside the Installer-visible dependency graph.
Retained for compatibility in this program; review optional editor presentation in a dedicated follow-up.

rules: Every Installer-visible package is assigned to exactly one dependency rank.
Every direct package dependency points to a strictly lower rank.
Runtime assemblies must not reference UnityEditor.
Deucarian-owned editor surfaces consume com.deucarian.editor for shared visual shell, chrome, styles, icons, and workflow controls unless an explicit architecture exception applies.
Common cannot depend on Logging, Editor, or domain packages.
Logging cannot depend on Diagnostics or telemetry.
Integration packages depend on every integration target plus only explicitly used foundations.
Suite package dependencies exactly match suiteMembers and suites remain implementation-free.
Package Registry dependencies match package.json direct Deucarian dependencies and versions.
Production and sample assembly references match direct package dependencies.
